note: Self-improving loop: improve multicolor pipeline for 20-30 color images; target hw_forest_cat quality.

tried.result: bit-identical (no cluster pairs in the new ΔE band)
n30_noisy -8.8% but global median +14%; clean cells regress (blur eats sharp synthetic detail)
global median nearly doubled; at n=30, genuine shapes (10-20px) fall below 131px threshold and get dissolved
global +35%; silhouette penalizes high-k solutions, forcing under-clustering on shape-rich inputs

observations: Iter 2-3: 4 param probes, 0 kept. Current defaults sit near a local minimum for synthetic median; single-param nudges mostly hurt.

Iter 3 palette audit (grep fill= from each render): k=20 has 5 dark-brown tones, k=30 has 6, k=50 has 15+. Higher k refines existing color FAMILIES (brown grades, cat-fur orange grades) but does not introduce NEW families. Tree doors are getting averaged with bark rather than given their own cluster.

Root cause likely upstream of k-tuning: k-means picks clusters weighted by pixel frequency, so rare salient colors (like a distinctive door) are absorbed by dominant surrounds. More k doesn't help because the extra budget is spent refining frequent colors.

Candidate next slice (out of scope for param tuning): salient-color-preserving quantization. Options: (a) saturation-weighted pre-pass that boosts high-chroma pixels before k-means, (b) octree / median-cut quantization that splits on color variance rather than pixel mass, (c) spatial coherence term that keeps spatially-isolated color regions even when small.

Synthetic sweep is a weak oracle for hw_forest_cat: clean synthetic penalizes denoise that real-world images need; noisy synthetic uses uniform noise unlike real JPEG/AI artifacts. A forest-cat-specific metric (e.g. ΔE spread of chosen palette vs. source's high-saturation pixels) would steer tuning better.

nextProbe.reason: Highest remaining loss; cheap remaining probes to exhaust.
candidates: denoisePasses: 2 → 3 (separate axis from radius; may help noisy without hurting clean as much)
Stop-loop candidate: declare plateau after 2-3 more rejected probes; recommend new slice for salient quantization.

exit_watch: 3 of 10 consecutive no-kept iterations. Likely to plateau without algorithmic change.
